file_insights.changes: Added cmd_providers() async CLI handler with full watch/json/interval support; implemented ANSI table rendering with percentage bars, relative time formatting, and error handling
Added Providers variant to Command enum with --watch, --json, --interval(u64, default=60) flags; wired handler
Enhanced list_cards_watch() to watch .auto-claude/specs/ for implementation_plan.json changes; force_redraw semantic added to distinguish plan changes from card stats changes
file_insights.impact: Spec plan awareness in live watch mode

file_insights.changes: Minor: added #[allow(dead_code)] annotation for rate_limit_tier field marked for future tier display
Minor: added #[allow(dead_code)] for read_history() public API; improved function comments documenting sparkline rendering as upcoming

patterns_discovered.pattern: Percentage bar visualization with health-based coloring
patterns_discovered.evidence: pct_bar() uses hardcoded ANSI 256-color codes: red (160) ≥90%, amber (172) ≥70%, green (71) <70%

patterns_discovered.pattern: Best-effort history append on fetch success
patterns_discovered.evidence: cmd_providers() appends to history only if fetch succeeds AND snap.error is None; errors are non-fatal

patterns_discovered.pattern: Error snapshot creation for failed fetches
patterns_discovered.evidence: Catch fetch() errors and create ProviderSnapshot with error field instead of propagating

patterns_discovered.pattern: Watch mode with screen clearing + interval-based refresh
patterns_discovered.evidence: cmd_providers() uses \x1b[2J\x1b[H (clear screen + move to top) in watch mode, tokio::time::sleep between loops
Channel carries bool: true=plan changed (force redraw), false=card changed (conditional redraw). Watches both .bop files and implementation_plan.json
patterns_discovered.frequency: New: distinguishes side-effect visibility from data changes

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: History append is silent on failure
gotchas_discovered.risk: Failed history writes go unnoticed; could silently lose usage data over time
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: history_path() returns Option, append_history() is fallible but error is discarded with _ = idiom

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Plan changes require force_redraw even when card stats are identical
gotchas_discovered.risk: Without this semantic, implementation_plan.json updates would not be visible in list watch (stats unchanged = no redraw)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Added force_redraw bool to watcher channel; logic: plan_changed → send(true), else card_changed → send(false)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Color palette hardcoded using ANSI 256-color codes
gotchas_discovered.risk: Not configurable; changes require code edit. Codes (160, 172, 71) are magic numbers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Could extract to constants or config, but current approach is simple

gotchas_discovered.risk: If a provider is installed after initial run, --watch mode won't detect it without restart
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Acceptable: providers are typically available before first CLI invocation; could re-instantiate on each loop if needed

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: read_history() marked dead_code but documented as public API for sparkline rendering (upcoming)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Dead code may be removed by future cleanup; documentation-only dependency
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: #[allow(dead_code)] annotation preserves it; comment signals future use

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS: Fully implemented bop providers command with: (1) Command enum variant with --watch/--json/--interval flags, (2) async cmd_providers() handler with detect/fetch/history-append pipeline, (3) ANSI table renderer with percentage bars + health coloring, (4) JSON output option, (5) watch mode with configurable interval. Also enhanced list_cards_watch() to monitor spec plan changes. All 6 files changed; 2 commits (subtask-4-1 primary, subtask-3-4 collateral for plan watching).
recommendations: Extract ANSI color codes (160, 172, 71) into named constants for reusability
Consider re-instantiating providers on each watch loop to detect newly-installed tools
Add --filter flag to providers command to filter by name (e.g. bop providers --filter claude)
Implement sparkline rendering in ProviderSnapshot display (history is logged, visualization pending)
Consider CSV export option: bop providers --csv > providers_export.csv
Add --raw flag for uncolored output (useful for CI/log files)
History file corruption check: read_history() silently skips malformed lines; consider --validate-history diagnostic command
Watch mode could debounce plan changes (batches within 500ms) to avoid rapid redraws on large spec updates
